ddt:Target.Name: AAM_Gen2_V2.3_SW400_SW410
ddt:Target.Description:
07/07/2022 Author : Louis DELAITRE
Ajout du SW410 dans Auto-identification, supprimer l'ancien et créer un nouveau car nouveau Vdiag Modification des fault types pour tous les O_PWM, O_LOG et O_POWER_CUTOFF (passage $11 en $12 et passage $13 en $14) Correction Data de la valeur 5 de O_LOG_10 ==> Renommer StartInProgress en Electrical IgnitionState Ajout description à plusieurs fonctions (aucun impacte sur la base DDT)
*********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************** 31/03/2021
Ajout du SW400/410 dans Auto-identification Nouvelle resolution (gain) pour les données I_Analog et I_PWR_X: "Calcul de la résolution :I_Analog (Entrée microcontrolleur - ADC sur 12 bits (max 4095) - Tension de référence à 5V Entrée ECU - Pont diviseur (120 Kohm et 47 kOhm)" =(5/4095)*(120 + 47)/47 = 0,004338451
"Calcul de la résolution I_PWR_x Entrée microcontrolleur - ADC sur 12 bits (max 4095) - Tension de référence à 5V Entrée ECU - Pont diviseur (47 Kohm *3 et 47 kOhm)" =(5/4095)*(47*4)/47 = 0,004884005
Renommer StartInProgress en Electrical IgnitionState Configurable algortihm Update Screens, DTCs and DIDs Sélection des portes (bits) qui configurent le MuteRadioOrder ajouté le 26/11/2021
*********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************** 29/10/2021
Update Auto-identification datas Update Screens, DTCs and DIDs *********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************** 03/08/2021
Author : Soufiane ALIDE Update Auto-identification datas *********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************** 25/06/2021
Author: Soufiane ALIDE
Database name: AAM_Gen2_V1.8_SW310 Add Version 3E (SW3E0) and 31(SW310) in Auto-identification Add DTC AAM_CONFIGURATION_FAILURE- DTC $9FA4 $55 Add Service ECUReset.hard 1101 Remove TUP data Update Screens, DTCs and DIDs Update resolution and offset values for parameters BAT_STABILIZED_MIN_VOLTAGE_CF, FRIDGE_RPM_MAX_CF, FRIDGE_RPM_MIN_CF, FRIDGE_RPM_HYST_CF *********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************** 20/04/2021
Author: Soufiane ALIDE
Add value 57 BatteryCoupling calibration in O_LOG_3 data Add XDD application Add Version 26 (SW260), 3F (SW3F0) and30 (SW300) in Auto-identification *********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************** 09/10/2019
Author: Georgiana RANGHIUC
Creation of the first version of Database for AAM Gen2 ECU - Applicable for X82Ph2 project. Database name: AAM_Gen2_V1.0.xml
=========================================================================
Author:Tatiana CAVOLEAU
DID Updated DTC Updated Screen creation

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Comment: VDIAG
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: DTCCount
Data.Comment: DTC count

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Comment: Software Version (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software Number (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Vehicle Identification Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Comment: ECU serial number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software Number

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: applicationDataIdentification
Data.Comment: Calibration Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application data identification record.

The format of the application data identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: programmingOperationFingerPrint
Data.Comment: Only for programmable ECU
Data.Description:
The value is written by the ECU when executing the SendKey SecurityAccess service

The value can be read in boot loader mode.

Data.Name: RALAC_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to set button type for RALAC

Data.Name: SEL_PWR_LIM_CUT_OFF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to activate to Output power cut off

Data.Name: TRAILER_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to activate the Trailer feature

Data.Name: ENG_RESTART_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to activate the ENG_RESTART feature

Data.Name: BAT_STABILIZED_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to activate the Battery stabilized feature

Data.Name: MUTE_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to activate the Mute Radio feature

Data.Name: BATT_COUPLING_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to activate the Battery coupling feature

Data.Name: MUTE_SW_TYPE_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to set button behaviour type for Mute Radio

Data.Name: O_LOG_1
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_1

Data.Name: O_LOG_1_power_limitation
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin power limitation for O_LOG_1

Item.Text: Output switch off following vehicle power limitation request

Data.Name: O_LOG_1_switch_off_condition
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin switch off condition for O_LOG_1

Item.Text: Output swtched off while engine stopped
Output switched off while engine starting
Output switched off while engine stopped & starting

Data.Name: O_LOG_2
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_2

Data.Name: O_LOG_3
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_3

Data.Name: O_LOG_4
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_4

Data.Name: O_LOG_5
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_5

Data.Name: O_LOG_6
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_6

Data.Name: O_LOG_7
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_7

Data.Name: O_LOG_8
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_8

Data.Name: O_LOG_9
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_9

Data.Name: O_LOG_10
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_10

Data.Name: O_LOG_2_power_limitation
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin power limitation for O_LOG_2

Item.Text: Output switch off following vehicle power limitation request

Data.Name: O_LOG_3_power_limitation
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin power limitation for O_LOG_3

Item.Text: Output switch off following vehicle power limitation request

Data.Name: O_LOG_4_power_limitation
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin power limitation for O_LOG_4

Item.Text: Output switch off following vehicle power limitation request

Data.Name: O_LOG_5_power_limitation
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin power limitation for O_LOG_5

Item.Text: Output switch off following vehicle power limitation request

Data.Name: O_LOG_6_power_limitation
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin power limitation for O_LOG_6

Item.Text: Output switch off following vehicle power limitation request

Data.Name: O_LOG_7_power_limitation
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin power limitation for O_LOG_7

Item.Text: Output switch off following vehicle power limitation request

Data.Name: O_LOG_8_power_limitation
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin power limitation for O_LOG_1

Item.Text: Output switch off following vehicle power limitation request

Data.Name: O_LOG_9_power_limitation
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin power limitation for O_LOG_9

Item.Text: Output switch off following vehicle power limitation request

Data.Name: O_LOG_10_power_limitation
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin power limitation for O_LOG_10

Item.Text: Output switch off following vehicle power limitation request

Data.Name: O_LOG_2_switch_off_condition
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin switch off condition for O_LOG_2

Item.Text: Output switched off while engine stopped
Output switched off while engine starting
Output switched off while engine stopped & starting

Data.Name: O_LOG_3_switch_off_condition
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin switch off condition for O_LOG_3

Item.Text: Output switched off while engine stopped
Output switched off while engine starting
Output switched off while engine stopped & starting

Data.Name: O_LOG_4_switch_off_condition
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin switch off condition for O_LOG_4

Item.Text: Output switched off while engine stopped
Output switched off while engine starting
Output switched off while engine stopped & starting

Data.Name: O_LOG_5_switch_off_condition
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin switch off condition for O_LOG_5

Item.Text: Output switched off while engine stopped
Output switched off while engine starting
Output switched off while engine stopped & starting

Data.Name: O_LOG_6_switch_off_condition
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin switch off condition for O_LOG_6

Item.Text: Output switched off while engine stopped
Output switched off while engine starting
Output switched off while engine stopped & starting

Data.Name: O_LOG_7_switch_off_condition
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin switch off condition for O_LOG_7

Item.Text: Output switched off while engine stopped
Output switched off while engine starting
Output switched off while engine stopped & starting

Data.Name: O_LOG_8_switch_off_condition
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin switch off condition for O_LOG_8

Item.Text: Output switched off while engine stopped
Output switched off while engine starting
Output switched off while engine stopped & starting

Data.Name: O_LOG_9_switch_off_condition
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin switch off condition for O_LOG_9

Item.Text: Output switched off while engine stopped
Output switched off while engine starting
Output switched off while engine stopped & starting

Data.Name: O_LOG_10_switch_off_condition
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin switch off condition for O_LOG_10

Item.Text: Output switched off while engine stopped
Output switched off while engine starting
Output switched off while engine stopped & starting

Data.Name: BAT_STABILIZED_VOLTAGE_RATE_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to select the voltage rate for the Battery Stabilized feature

Data.Name: BAT_STABILIZED_MIN_VOLTAGE_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to select the minimum voltage for the Battery Stabilized feature

Data.Name: Left Flasher Trailer Output
Data.Comment: Left Flasher Trailer Output

Data.Name: FRIDGE_DRIVE_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to activate the Fridge feature

Data.Name: BAT_STABILIZED_SW_TYPE_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to set button type for Battery stabilized feature

Data.Name: FRIDGE_RPM_MAX_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to select the maximum engine speed for fridge drive

Data.Name: FRIDGE_RPM_MIN_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to select the minimum engine speed for fridge drive activation

Data.Name: FRIDGE_RPM_HYST_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure hysteresis in percentage to apply to min and max engine speed

Data.Name: BootVersion
Data.Comment: BootSoftwareIdentificationDataIdentifier
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: OperationalReference
Data.Comment: OperationalReference

Data.Name: IndexSrvData
Data.Comment: IndexSrvData

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber_DAI
Data.Comment: "The VehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber_DAI (F1.11) shall be implemented ONLY by all ECU designed

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber_DAI
Data.Comment: "This reference corresponds to the reference to the pdx file, which will be download in plant or in

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPart
Data.Comment: VehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPart

Data.Name: I_LOG_1_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable/disable logical data sent on CAN_EXT and/or CAN_ADAPT_1

Item.Text: Data sent on CAN_EXT and CAN_ADAP1

Data.Name: I_LOG_2_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable/disable logical data sent on CAN_EXT and/or CAN_ADAPT_1

Item.Text: Data sent on CAN_EXT and CAN_ADAP1

Data.Name: I_LOG_3_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable/disable logical data sent on CAN_EXT and/or CAN_ADAPT_1

Item.Text: Data sent on CAN_EXT and CAN_ADAP1

Data.Name: I_LOG_4_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable/disable logical data sent on CAN_EXT and/or CAN_ADAPT_1

Item.Text: Data sent on CAN_EXT and CAN_ADAP1

Data.Name: I_LOG_5_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable/disable logical data sent on CAN_EXT and/or CAN_ADAPT_1

Item.Text: Data sent on CAN_EXT and CAN_ADAP1

Data.Name: I_LOG_6_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable/disable logical data sent on CAN_EXT and/or CAN_ADAPT_1

Item.Text: Data sent on CAN_EXT and CAN_ADAP1->predisposition_only

Data.Name: I_LOG_7_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable/disable logical data sent on CAN_EXT and/or CAN_ADAPT_1

Item.Text: Data sent on CAN_EXT and CAN_ADAP1->predisposition_only

Data.Name: FOOTSTEP_VEH_SPEED_MIN_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure the threshold for footstep activation.

Data.Name: FOOTSTEP_VEH_SPEED_HYST_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure the hysteresis threshold for footstep activation.

Data.Name: PRODUCER_LOAD_LOW_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure the Low threshold for Producer load

Data.Name: PRODUCER_LOAD_HIGH_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure the High threshold for Producer load

Data.Name: PRODUCER_LOAD_HIGH_DELAY_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure the Producer_load delay for the High threshold

Data.Name: O_POWER_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to activate the O_POWER supply feature

Item.Text: Lamp is inactive, controlled by AAM
Lamp is active, controlled by AAM
Lamp is inactive, controlled by AAM
Lamp is active, controlled by AAM
Lamp is inactive, controlled by AAM
Lamp is active, controlled by AAM

Data.Name: O_PWM_7
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to set the Output PWM 7 signal

Data.Name: O_PWM_6
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to set the Output PWM 6 signal

Data.Name: O_PWM_5
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to set the Output PWM 5 signal

Data.Name: O_PWM_4
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to set the Output PWM 4 signal

Data.Name: O_PWM_3
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to set the Output PWM 3 signal

Data.Name: O_PWM_2
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to set the Output PWM 2 signal

Data.Name: O_PWM_1
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to set the Output PWM 1 signal

Data.Name: O_LOG_1_value
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_1

Data.Name: O_LOG_10_value
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_10

Data.Name: O_LOG_2_value
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_2

Data.Name: O_LOG_3_value
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_3

Data.Name: O_LOG_4_value
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_4

Data.Name: O_LOG_5_value
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_5

Data.Name: O_LOG_6_value
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_6

Data.Name: O_LOG_7_value
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_7

Data.Name: O_LOG_8_value
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_8

Data.Name: O_LOG_9_value
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for O_LOG_9

Item.Text: Automatic or manual Parking brake not applied
Automatic or manual Parking brake applied

Data.Name: I_ANALOG_1_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable/disable the analog data sent on CAN_EXT and/or CAN_ADAPT_1

Item.Text: Data sent on CAN_EXT and CAN_ADAP1

Data.Name: I_ANALOG_2_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable/disable the analog data sent on CAN_EXT and/or CAN_ADAPT_1

Item.Text: Data sent on CAN_EXT and CAN_ADAP1

Data.Name: I_ANALOG_3_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable/disable the analog data sent on CAN_EXT and/or CAN_ADAPT_1

Item.Text: Data sent on CAN_EXT and CAN_ADAP1

Data.Name: DOOR_MUTE_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable driver door to mute Radio

Data.Name: DOOR_MUTE_CF .DOOR_MUTE_TAILGATE_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable tailgate door to mute Radio

Data.Name: DOOR_MUTE_CF .DOOR_MUTE_REAR_RIGHT_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable rear right door to mute Radio

Data.Name: DOOR_MUTE_CF .DOOR_MUTE_REAR_LEFT_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to enable rear left door to mute Radio

Data.Name: DOOR_MUTE_CF .DOOR_MUTE_PASSENGER_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure the doors on wich radio shall be muted.

Data.Name: DOOR_MUTE_CF .DOOR_MUTE_DRIVER_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure the doors on wich radio shall be muted.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

Data.Name: CONFIGURABLE_ALGORITHM_CF
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to activate the Configurable Algorithm

Data.Name: CONFIGURABLE_ALGORITHM_CF.VAR1
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for VAR1

Data.Name: CONFIGURABLE_ALGORITHM_CF.VAR2
Data.Comment: This calibration is used to configure logical output pin algorithm for VAR2

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Comment: CalibrationNumber

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000 nor for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC for Clip import

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Extended
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: DataRead.Mileage of the occurrence counter
Request.Comment: Read Odometer of the last occurence

Label.Text: BootVersion [$F180]: (this value is avalaible only if AAM is on Boot mode)
Write datas (you have to be in diagnostic session)
!!! Be careful : the configuration can be written only once !!!

Screen.Name: 1- Read/Write Customization of Logical and PWM Outputs

Label.Text: Read/Write Customization of Logical and PWM Outputs

Screen.Name: 2- Read/Write Power Limitation for Logical Outputs

Label.Text: Read/Write Power Limitation for Logical Outputs

Screen.Name: 3- Read/Write Switch off condition for Logical Outputs

Label.Text: Read/Write Switch off condition for Logical Outputs
FRIDGE_RPM_HYST_CF not coded in SW 300 and SW31x

Screen.Name: 6. Read only I/O value AAM (AVAILABLE from SW400 and above)

Label.Text: Read only I/O value AAM / AVAILABLE from SW400 and above
Configurable Algortihm (with X82PH2_configurable algorithm values) available from SW400
To specify value, apply this formula:

Screen.Name: 6. Read only I/O value AAM (AVAILABLE from SW400 and above)(0)

Label.Text: Read only I/O value AAM / AVAILABLE from SW400 and above
